title: Smithsonian Collection Object
description: Schema for a digitized Smithsonian collection object returned by the Open Access API.

id.description: Unique identifier for the collection object.

unitCode.description: Code identifying the Smithsonian museum or research unit.

linkedId.description: Linked identifier if the object is associated with another record.

type.description: Object type determining the content schema.

url.description: Canonical URL identifier for the object.

content.description: Type-specific content metadata. Structure varies by object type.

hash.description: SHA-1 content hash of the record.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp when the record was created in the system.

lastTimeUpdated.description: Unix timestamp when the record was last updated.

version.description: Version identifier string for the record.
